{{Infobox concept
| name = Dreamseeds
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dreamseeds]] are located overhead in the facility.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dreamseeds]] are spirits that can take a solid form.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreamseeds]] are mentioned as a potential reward.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
